theme_notes: Taglines drawn from the US-Iran military conflict entering its fifth consecutive day of strikes over the Strait of Hormuz (Brent crude at $86/barrel) and the FIFA World Cup 2026 semifinals — Messi's Argentina rallying past England 2-1, Spain blanking France 2-0, setting up an Argentina-Spain final.
settled: Even. Ask Argentina and Spain to resolve things this cleanly on Sunday.
Zero balance. More honest than anything coming out of the Strait right now.
Balanced. The only thing in the region that is.
youOwe: Less than oil moved in a day. Cute little crisis you've got here.
Messi came back from 1-0 down. You can come back from this.
Iran owes more to global shipping. You still owe this.
That's a tank of gas at Hormuz-panic prices. Which you didn't pay.
England blew a halftime lead to Argentina. You blew this off longer.
Nosková beat Muchová in straight sets. Settle this that cleanly.
Oil cleared $86 a barrel this week. Your excuse didn't clear fifty.
France lost 2-0. Bigger than that gap, smaller than their shame.
The US ran five days of strikes. You can manage one transfer.
Messi scored a late winner. This debt's scoring late on your credit score.
A Strait-of-Hormuz-level blockade on their goodwill. You caused it.
Brent crude jumped $16 since last week. Your commitment: flat.
Argentina made the World Cup final. You made their personal nemesis list.
That's a flight to the final in Miami. You're not invited.
Five days of US airstrikes and they're still calmer than your partner.
You've personally sanctioned the Strait of Goodwill. It's closed.
Bigger than Iran's oil revenue losses this week. That's saying something.
The Pentagon couldn't budget this. A federal intervention is on the table.
theyOwe: Rounding error. Iran's billing the US more per missile. Collect anyway.
Less than Wimbledon strawberries with cream. They had the strawberries.
England didn't let the scoreline stop the excuses. Neither should you.
They've had this since before the World Cup semis. Inexcusable.
More than France scored against Spain. Still, it's yours.
That's World Cup final program money. Make them fund yours.
England got Messi'd in injury time. You're getting your-partner'd in real time.
Spain moved on from France clinically. Try that.
Hormuz is blockaded. So is their conscience about this debt.
You financed this friendship's run. They didn't even make the final.
Oil jumped $16 a barrel. This amount: unmoved for weeks.
The US ran five straight days of airstrikes. You've run out of soft options.
That's a World Cup final ticket in Miami. They owe you the seat.
This has escalated faster than US-Iran and with less international coverage.
Iran is defending the Strait harder than they're defending this IOU.
The US hit Iran five times this week. You've asked once. Take notes.
You're owed enough to reroute a tanker around the blockade. Consider it.
Spain vs Argentina. You vs ever being repaid. Both are world-historic events.
